title: Boondock's Juke Joint
desc: Established in 2014, Boondock's Juke Joint has an authentic juke joint feel. It's open to Blues music lovers 24/7, with live DJs on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays.

title: Enchantment Presents: Tales from the Jungle
desc: Step into the lush world of Tales from the Jungle, Enchantment’s immersive May round inspired by classic jungle tales and reimagined through a magical fantasy lens. Wander beneath the canopy where ancient paths wind through living landscapes, myth lingers in shadow and stone, and untamed beauty surrounds you. Explore a curated marketplace filled with inspired fashion, décor, and fantastical creations, then enjoy a free grid-wide hunt, music, dancing, costume contest, quests, fantasy art by the Lost Unicorn Gallery, and a photography contest. Tales from the Jungle runs May 9th through May 31st. Come and be Enchanted!

title: Abnormality
desc: Abnormality is a shopping event focused on all things human-alternative: furries, fantasy, and everywhere in between! It runs every 3 months from the 7th to the 28th. This month's theme is Freakshow. Come on down to the Circus! Get your freak on! Come see all sorts of amusement and unique shopping items! Learn more at abnormality.is

title: Berlin Klein
desc: Berlin Klein is a realistic nightclub focused on EDM and live DJ performances. Every Saturday, DJs take the stage for scheduled sets in an open, LGBTQ-friendly space. Access is free through wristbands or tickets, with a focus on music, community, and a consistent party atmosphere.

title: L'aEvo
desc: L'aEvo is a quiet garden retreat set among trees and gentle paths. Visitors can relax by the water, gather around a fire pit, or enjoy game tables for casual play and conversation. The space invites small groups seeking calm, connection, and a romantic outdoor setting.

title: Velvet Bohème
desc: Lose yourself in Velvet Bohème, a two-week boho festival blending shopping, art, music, and literature in Second Life. Shop, soak up the atmosphere, or catch a live singer or DJ from partner venues Altitude and Sanctum. Open April 4 to 18, 2026.

title: Frequency Bay Club
desc: Frequency Bay Club (FBC) is a French-speaking nightlife destination with international DJs, live sets, and a packed dancefloor. Visitors can enjoy house, techno, dance, and pop music in a club atmosphere focused on parties, socializing, and live events.

title: MadPea Crimson Clues Grid-Wide Hunt
desc: Step into a world of mystery, deception, and long-forgotten crimes in MadPea Crimson Clues: Cold Cases - a thrilling grid-wide hunt where every clue brings you closer to the truth. Search for hidden evidence, unlock unsolved cases, and investigate new crime scenes to earn prizes. The hunt runs from May 5th to June 3rd.

title: Etopia Earth Day Celebrations AIDFZyTo
desc: To help celebrate Earth Day for 2026, you're invited to explore, engage, and enjoy exhibits, activities, and discussions related to the theme "Our power, Our Planet". From wetlands exploration to bike trails, train rides to meditation spots, conversations and resources to cafes and gondola rides. Celebrations will kick off on 17 April and close with an Earth Day dance on 23 April at Etopia in Second Life.

title: Thistle by the Sea
desc: Nestled along a windswept coast, Thistle by the Sea is a cozy seaside escape where salt air and simple comforts invite you to slow down. Visit the Wooly Thistle Pub, enjoy something sweet from The Salted Scoop Ice Cream Shoppe, or stop by The Green Shutter Inn. With cozy spots to relax, games to enjoy, and a waterfront boat rez zone, there's something here for both quiet moments and gentle adventure. Thistle by the Sea, where salt air, small comforts, and coastal charm meet.

title: Velvet Bohème idkytevs
desc: Lose yourself in Velvet Bohème, a two-week boho festival blending shopping, art, music, and literature in Second Life. Shop, soak up the atmosphere, or catch a live singer or DJ from partner venues Altitude and Sanctum. Open April 4 to 18, 2026.

title: Norway Racing Festival yrTsIZhi
desc: Norway Racing Festival is a multi-day virtual motorsport event hosted in Second Life, bringing together racing enthusiasts, drivers, performers, and creators from around the world. The festival features races, drift shows, live performances, contests, and community-driven activities, all designed to create an immersive and exciting motorsport experience. The event runs from March 16th through the grand finale on the 22nd. Learn more at nrfevent.com

title: Oops I Bought It Again
desc: Oops I Bought It Again is a monthly sale event packed with deals, discounts, fashion, décor, and irresistible finds you didn’t know you needed. It runs from the 7th through the end of the month. All Items are at least 25% off the full price.

title: Raglan Shire Artwalk
desc: Raglan Shire's 21st Artwalk takes place Sunday, May 17th, through Sunday, June 14th. It's a four-week-long event spanning 5 regions. Over 100 artists from around the world participate in this annual event. Everything from RL photos, paintings, and drawings to SL sculptures will be displayed on the hedges. The Artwalk also features weekly games and poetry slams, a kite parade, DJs, and live music.

title: Surrender D Booty
desc: Surrender D Booty is a pirate-themed club with DJs streaming blues, classic rock, country, and pop. Guests can explore pirate ships, relax in cuddle spots, visit the art gallery, or try the burnout bike challenge in the castle game room. Requests and dedications are welcome, and the destination is MC-friendly with a laid-back social atmosphere for friends and newcomers.

title: Robots and spiders by Cica Ghost
desc: “I like nonsense, it wakes up the brain cells. Fantasy is a necessary ingredient in living.” - Dr. Seuss

title: Filthy Rich Nightclub
desc: Classy, chic, and very "now," Filthy Rich provides dancing, dating, relaxing, companionship, and so much more. A contemporary music stream to lead you into that special encounter and adventure through dance and chat. Private skyboxes to escape the main floor "noise." Filthy Rich, the club you never knew you needed in your SL, until now.

title: GUY Magazine PRIDE in Space 2026 DoIZENVX
desc: GUY Magazine PRIDE in Space 2026 is this year’s installment of GUY Magazine’s annual Pride festival, hosted at The Portal. It features shopping, games, carnival rides, live acts, and parties throughout June, with an opening celebration on May 31 and events like live dance shows and a K-pop concert.

title: Bellisseria Birthday Bash QxuptISy
desc: Bellisseria Birthday Bash brings a week-long celebration to the Fairgrounds with tours, live DJs, and collectible passport stamps. Visitors can explore by air, sea, and land, take part in driving and flying challenges, and join community ceremonies from April 14–20. Learn more at gazetteorg.wordpress.com

title: Cerulean Township
desc: Spring has settled into Cerulean like it always knew the way back. The air feels softer here, the light lingers a little longer, and everything hums with the promise of slow days ahead.

title: Gulls Wing Sailing Club
desc: Established in 2013, the Gulls Wing Sailing Club offers sailing, waterfront rentals, and a relaxed coastal community spread across 25 connected regions. Visitors can explore the harbor, nature preserve, and underwater areas by boat, kayak, or submersible. The destination also features live music and dancing at Dassani’s Music Venue and scenic paths throughout the estate.

title: Amore's Cafe
desc: Amore’s Cafe is a casual hangout spot with coffee, trivia, arcade collectibles, and interactive games. Visitors can fish with 7Seas, explore breedables like KittyCats and Meeroos, or relax in the garden areas with friends.

title: L'Arcadia Club
desc: L'Arcadia Club is an international cyber-themed destination and French club, focused on electronic music and nightlife. Visitors can dance to techno, trance, deep house, and progressive sounds, attend concerts and events, or relax and chat with friends in a futuristic club atmosphere.

title: AISM Event 2026
desc: From May 15th to May 30th, 2026, step into a world of music, entertainment, and solidarity with AISM 2026! An exceptional event, a marathon of entertainment in Second Life, entirely dedicated to supporting AISM in its fight against multiple sclerosis. Get ready for hours of fun, wild dances, and breathtaking performances! Visit and experience unforgettable moments, all for a noble cause.

title: Steel Havoc MC & Club eyGmgdjs
desc: Steel Havoc MC & Club brings a gritty biker club atmosphere with pulsing lights and a focus on music and crowd energy. Expect sets spanning many genres, including rock, with a space built for loud nights, social connection, and high-energy events.

title: Bid the Lindens Bald bUOYCQwW
desc: Bid the Lindens & Moles Bald returns for its 10th annual showdown in support of Relay For Life in Second Life. Teams of Lindens and Moles literally put their hair on the line. Residents vote with their donations: the teams that raise the most keep their locks, while the team that raises the least will go bald until the next birthday celebrations. Voting opens during RelayStock on April 10 and runs through April 15, culminating in the always-entertaining Haircut Party from 12:00–2:30 PM SLT, with the clippers coming out at 2:15 PM SLT. Learn more at relayrockers.org/bidthelindensbald

title: VWBPE 2026 Conference BzfnytvE
desc: The Virtual Worlds Best Practices in Education Conference runs March 19–21, 2026. This open conference is organized by educators to showcase learning, tools, and methods for virtual environments. Join the event for three days of lectures, workshops, discussions, games, and more - including a keynote speech by the Founder of Second Life, Philip Rosedale, and interviews with other Linden Lab executives. Learn more at vwbpe.org

title: Alley Catz Club
desc: Alley Catz Live Music and Dance Club is what its title suggests. Their motto is “Traverse the lensing effect of music, dance, and light.” They run the venue on a single performance model, providing performers and patrons with a unique setting to experience live music in a warm and friendly setting within a fully supported PBR environment. When the venue is not used for performances, it is an ideal place to come with that someone special and dance the night away.
